heading: Foreign language proficiency: special pay for proficiency beneficial for other national security interests
label: 1596a Foreign language proficiency: special pay for proficiency beneficial for other national security interests
notes: Amendments2004—Subsec. (a)(2). struck out “during a contingency operation supported by the armed forces” after “foreign language”.Pub. L. 108–375

children.text: has been certified by the Secretary to be proficient in a foreign language identified by the Secretary as being a language in which proficiency by civilian personnel of the Department is necessary because of national security interests;
is assigned duties requiring proficiency in that foreign language; and
is not receiving special pay under .section 1596 of this title

children.heading: .—Rate
children.label: b .—Rate
children.text: The rate of special pay for an employee under this section shall be prescribed by the Secretary, but may not exceed five percent of the employee’s rate of basic pay.

children.heading: .—Relationship to Other Pay and Allowances
children.label: c .—Relationship to Other Pay and Allowances
children.text: Special pay under this section is in addition to any other pay or allowances to which the employee is entitled.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: d .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall prescribe regulations to carry out this section.
